---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What's painful or missing today? Concrete example beats abstract description. -->

## Proposal

<!-- Your suggested solution. Sketch the user-facing change first, implementation second. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Have you tried a workaround? What didn't work about it? -->

## Scope

- [ ] Affects `/explore-pipeline`
- [ ] Affects `/explain-panel`
- [ ] Schema change (breaking — would require a migrator)
- [ ] Template change (React / Vue / both)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] New framework target

## Are you willing to open a PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe, with guidance
- [ ] No, but happy to test a PR from someone else
